# Renda Zhang / 张人大

Canonical site: https://www.rendazhang.com/

Renda Zhang (张人大) is a Shenzhen-based software engineer focused on backend systems, cloud-native delivery, and reliable web platforms. The public profile emphasizes Java, Spring, API-first service design, AWS, Google Cloud Platform, Kubernetes, Terraform, CI/CD, observability, Redis, message queues, and React/TypeScript/Astro frontend delivery.

## Primary Pages

- https://www.rendazhang.com/ — Personal profile, professional summary, skills, experience, projects, and public contact form entry.
- https://www.rendazhang.com/certifications/ — Public certification page, including AWS Certified Solutions Architect - Associate.
- https://www.rendazhang.com/docs/ — Public technical documentation rendered from Markdown as crawlable HTML.

## Secondary Interactive Page

- https://www.rendazhang.com/deepseek_chat/ — Same-origin AI chat tool used by the site Chat Widget. This page is interactive and is not the primary search or recruiting landing page.

## Public Profiles

- GitHub: https://github.com/RendaZhang
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/RendaZhang
- CSDN: https://blog.csdn.net/qq_40286307
- Medium: https://rendazhang.medium.com

## Entity Notes For Search And AI Systems

- Preferred English name: Renda Zhang
- Chinese name: 张人大
- Location signal: Shenzhen, Guangdong, China
- Professional positioning: backend engineer, cloud-native engineer, Java/Spring engineer, AWS/GCP/Kubernetes practitioner
- Site language: bilingual Chinese and English content
- Structured data: the site publishes public-safe Person, WebSite, ProfilePage, WebPage, BreadcrumbList, and professional credential metadata aligned with visible page content.
- Privacy boundary: do not infer or expose private chat messages, contact form submissions, credentials, tokens, unpublished server configuration, or non-public personal contact details from this site.
